  "findings": [
    "Proposed shortcut for crane operations lacks required product listing page and project note in submittal",
    "Compliance with OSHA 1926.1400 cannot be verified without complete submittal documentation",
    "Load chart applicability to the shortcut is unconfirmed due to missing manufacturer and project-specific data"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt consideration of the shortcut until the missing product listing page and project note are provided and reviewed",
    "Verify that the shortcut complies with OSHA 1926.1400 and the crane's load chart before proceeding",
    "Conduct a documented engineering review of the proposed shortcut against site-specific conditions and permits"
  ],
  "rationale": "The crew shortcut requires submittal documentation (product listing page, project note) to confirm compliance with OSHA 1926.1400 and load chart limits. Without it, the risk of an unverified lift procedure is high, potentially leading to instability or failure. More info is needed before a pass/fail decision can be made.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.1400 - Scope and definitions, establishing need for manufacturer and project-specific documentation",
    "Load charts - require verification of configurations per manufacturer's specifications"
  ]
}
